Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Am’haranai]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — The shroud is a symbol of the Am’haranai dating back over two thousand years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — The Am’haranai are a group that used Waveriders as mounts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — The Am’haranai is a language that predates Imperial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — The Am’haranai are the Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — The Am’haranai have eyes and ears throughout the Aurelian Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Shera is called upon to swear secrecy in the name of the Am'haranai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 12''' — The Am’haranai is an order or group Shera swears to protect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 12''' — The Am’haranai have existed since before the first one called herself a Gardener.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — The original Am'haranai had secrets that Councilors tried to keep buried.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — The Am’haranai were buried with their blacks and weapons at the founding of their Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 20''' — The Am’haranai are an order of killers for hire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — The Am’haranai have secret laws that prohibit non-human entities from having a seat on the Council of Architects.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — The Am'haranai are allies of the Regents for independence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Architects are one of the orders of Am'haranai.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — The Am’haranai are a group mentioned by Loreli.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — A squad of Am’haranai could infiltrate servants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 7''' — The Am'haranai order requires members to swear absolute obedience to their leader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 7''' — The Am’haranai existed before the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — The Am’haranai hide in the shadows like criminals and liars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — The Am’haranai are a group that Bastion is designed to defend during the execution of their duties.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
